parameters.content:
## W5 - Error Handler

**Purpose:** Centralized fatal error routing for W1-W4 workflows.

**Trigger:** Error Workflow — automatically invoked when any workflow referencing W5 encounters an unhandled fatal error.

**Actions:**
1. Parse error details (workflow name, node, message, execution ID)
2. Format notification using F-3 pattern: `\u274C [{CODE}] {message}. {recovery}`
3. Send formatted error notification to LobeHub (blocked in DRY_RUN mode)

**DRY_RUN Behavior:**
- Notification is logged but NOT sent to LobeHub
- Error parsing and formatting still execute normally
